description: OpenShift Pipelines nightly build performance. Use the Deployment Configuration variable to switch between Standard, HA, QBT, and HA+QBT setups.

panels.description: Total number of PipelineRuns that completed successfully, averaged per day per concurrency level.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_PipelineRuns_count_succeeded')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pr_succeeded
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_count_succeeded'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pr_succeeded @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  pr_succeeded AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: PipelineRun Succeeded

panels.description: Total number of PipelineRuns that failed, averaged per day per concurrency level. A value of 0 means all runs succeeded.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_PipelineRuns_count_failed')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pr_failed
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_count_failed'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pr_failed @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  pr_failed AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: PipelineRun Failed

panels.description: Average wall-clock duration of all PipelineRuns (creationTimestamp to completionTime), per day per concurrency level.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (

  FROM data

    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_duration_avg'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pr_duration @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  pr_duration AS value

panels.title: PR Mean Duration

panels.description:
Breakdown of successful PipelineRun duration into two phases:
- **pending**: time from creation to start (waiting for scheduling)
- **running**: time from start to completion (actual execution)

High pending time indicates scheduling pressure; high running time indicates slow task execution.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_PipelineRuns_Success_pending_avg')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pending,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_PipelineRuns_Success_running_avg')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS running
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_Success_pending_avg'
    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_Success_running_avg'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pending @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  pending AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'running @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  running AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Succeeded PR Metrics (pending / running)

panels.description: Total number of TaskRuns that completed successfully, averaged per day per concurrency level. Each PipelineRun creates multiple TaskRuns.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_TaskRuns_count_succeeded')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS tr_succeeded
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_TaskRuns_count_succeeded'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'tr_succeeded @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  tr_succeeded AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: TR Mean Success Duration

panels.description:
Breakdown of successful TaskRun duration into two phases:
- **pending**: time from creation to start (waiting for Pod scheduling)
- **running**: time from start to completion (actual container execution)

High pending time indicates Pod scheduling delays or resource pressure.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_TaskRuns_Success_pending_avg')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pending,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_TaskRuns_Success_running_avg')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS running
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_TaskRuns_Success_pending_avg'
    AND label_values ? '__results_TaskRuns_Success_running_avg'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pending @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  pending AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'running @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  running AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Succeeded TR Metrics (pending / running)

panels.description: Mean time between TaskRun creation and its corresponding Pod creation. Measures how long the Tekton controller takes to reconcile a TaskRun and create the Pod. High values indicate controller backlog.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_TaskRunsToPods_creationTimestampDiff_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pod_creation_lag
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_TaskRunsToPods_creationTimestampDiff_mean'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pod_creation_lag @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  pod_creation_lag AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: TaskRun to Pod Creation Duration

panels.description:
Mean CPU usage of Tekton Pipelines components during the test run, in CPU cores (e.g. 0.06 = 60 millicores).
- **controller_cpu**: main reconciliation controller
- **webhook_cpu**: admission webhook
- **proxy_webhook_cpu**: operator proxy webhook

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonPipelinesController_cpu_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS controller_cpu,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonOperatorProxyWebhook_cpu_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS proxy_webhook_cpu,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonPipelinesWebhook_cpu_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS webhook_cpu
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonPipelinesController_cpu_mean'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonOperatorProxyWebhook_cpu_mean'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonPipelinesWebhook_cpu_mean'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'controller_cpu @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  controller_cpu AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'proxy_webhook_cpu @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  proxy_webhook_cpu AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'webhook_cpu @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  webhook_cpu AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Controllers CPU Usage (Mean)

Mean memory (RSS) usage of Tekton Pipelines components during the test run.
- **controller_mem**: main reconciliation controller
- **webhook_mem**: admission webhook
- **proxy_webhook_mem**: operator proxy webhook

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT

  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonPipelinesController_memory_mean'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonOperatorProxyWebhook_memory_mean'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonPipelinesWebhook_memory_mean'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'controller_mem @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  controller_mem AS value

UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'proxy_webhook_mem @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  proxy_webhook_mem AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'webhook_mem @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  webhook_mem AS value

ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Controllers Memory Usage (Mean)

panels.description:
Mean depth of the Tekton Pipelines controller workqueue during the test. A growing workqueue indicates the controller cannot reconcile objects fast enough. Consistently high values suggest the controller is a bottleneck.

Note: Nightly builds using Tekton >= v1.10 report this as kn_workqueue_depth (OpenTelemetry).

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonTektonPipelinesControllerWorkqueueDepth_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS workqueue_depth
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonTektonPipelinesControllerWorkqueueDepth_mean'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'workqueue_depth @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  workqueue_depth AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Pipelines Controller Workqueue Depth

panels.description:
Mean HTTP client latency (p50) of the Tekton Pipelines controller when communicating with the Kubernetes API server. High latency indicates API server pressure or network issues.

Note: Nightly builds using Tekton >= v1.10 report this as http_client_request_duration_seconds (OpenTelemetry).

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonPipelinesControllerClientLatencyAverage_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS client_latency
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonPipelinesControllerClientLatencyAverage_mean'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'client_latency @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  client_latency AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Pipelines Controller Client Latency

panels.title: Cluster CPU Usage

panels.title: Cluster Memory Usage

panels.description: Mean CPU usage of the OpenShift API server and Kubernetes API server during the test run, in CPU cores. High values may indicate excessive API calls from the Tekton controller or other components.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_apiserver_cpu_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS apiserver_cpu,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_kubeApiserver_cpu_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS kube_apiserver_cpu
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_apiserver_cpu_mean'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_kubeApiserver_cpu_mean'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT

UNION ALL

  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'kube_apiserver_cpu @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  kube_apiserver_cpu AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: OpenShift and Kube API Server CPU Usage (Mean)

panels.description: Mean memory usage of the OpenShift API server and Kubernetes API server during the test run.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_apiserver_memory_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS apiserver_mem,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_kubeApiserver_memory_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS kube_apiserver_mem
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_apiserver_memory_mean'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_kubeApiserver_memory_mean'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'apiserver_mem @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  apiserver_mem AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'kube_apiserver_mem @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  kube_apiserver_mem AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: OpenShift and Kube API Server Memory Usage (Mean)

panels.description:
Mean etcd MVCC database size during the test run.
- **db_total**: total allocated DB size on disk
- **db_in_use**: portion of the DB actively in use

A large gap between total and in-use may indicate fragmentation or the need for defragmentation.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_etcdMvccDbTotalSizeInUseInBytesAverage_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS db_in_use,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_etcdMvccDbTotalSizeInBytesAverage_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS db_total
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_etcdMvccDbTotalSizeInUseInBytesAverage_mean'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_etcdMvccDbTotalSizeInBytesAverage_mean'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'db_in_use @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  db_in_use AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'db_total @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  db_total AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: etcd MVCC DB Size (Mean)

panels.description:
Average and maximum etcd request duration during the test run.
- **req_duration_mean**: average latency across all etcd requests
- **req_duration_max**: worst-case (peak) etcd request latency

High values indicate etcd is under pressure, which can cause slow reconciliation and API server latency.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_etcdRequestDurationSecondsAverage_max')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS req_duration_max,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_etcdRequestDurationSecondsAverage_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS req_duration_mean
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_etcdRequestDurationSecondsAverage_max'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_etcdRequestDurationSecondsAverage_mean'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'req_duration_max @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  req_duration_max AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'req_duration_mean @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  req_duration_mean AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: etcd Request Duration (Mean)

panels.description: Number of etcd Pod restarts during the test run. Should be 0 under normal conditions. Any restarts indicate instability that likely affected test results.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_etcd_restarts_range')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS etcd_restarts
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_etcd_restarts_range'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'etcd_restarts @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  etcd_restarts AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: etcd Restarts

panels.description: Range of pending pods count in the Kubernetes scheduler during the test run. High values indicate scheduling pressure — pods are waiting for resources or node availability.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_schedulerPendingPodsCount_range')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pending_pods
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 391
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER IN ($concurrency)

    AND (
  ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-statefulsets' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'statefulSets' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('[[deploy_config]]' = 'ha-qbt-deployments' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_controllerType') = 'deployments' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ((label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ((label_values ? '__deployment_isNightlyBuild') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_isNightlyBuild')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_schedulerPendingPodsCount_range'
  GROUP BY day, concurrency
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pending_pods @ ' || concurrency AS metric,
  pending_pods AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Scheduler Pending Pods

list.description: Standard, HA (no QBT), QBT (non-HA), or HA+QBT (deployments only). Dashboard shows nightly builds only.
list.label: Deployment Configuration
list.name: deploy_config
list.query: Standard : standard,HA - Deployments : ha-deployments,HA - StatefulSets : ha-statefulsets,QBT (non-HA) : qbt,HA + QBT - Deployments : ha-qbt-deployments

list.description: Filter by concurrency level. Select one or more, or All.
list.label: Concurrency
list.name: concurrency
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT (label_values->>'__parameters_test_concurrent')::INTEGER AS concurrency FROM data WHERE horreum_testid = 391 AND label_values ? '__parameters_test_concurrent' ORDER BY concurrency

title: Pipelines Performance Dashboard
